event_description: I do not have reliable, specific knowledge of LivePerson Inc. (LPSN) filing a formal Item 4.02 non-reliance restatement or being subject to a confirmed SEC accounting-fraud investigation. What I do recall (with lower confidence) is that around late 2023–early 2024, LivePerson faced governance/disclosure controversy tied to media reports alleging inappropriate personal conduct by then-CEO Robert LoCascio and its potential business/financial impact, which reportedly contributed to a delayed annual report (10-K) filing and ultimately his stepping down as CEO in 2024. I do not have confident recall of this being formalized as a GAAP restatement of prior financials or an SEC accounting-fraud investigation specifically, nor of a CFO/finance-executive departure explicitly tied to a financial-misstatement finding. Given the uncertainty and lack of a clear, specific restatement event in my training data, I am not confident enough to assert a definitive Item 4.02 restatement occurred.
approx_date: Late 2023 to mid 2024 (delayed 10-K filing and CEO transition)
